exercises.title: Research Survey
hints: Include NTT optimization, threshold crypto, QROM proofs

exercises.description: Analyze potential applications of PQC-based FHE.
hints: FHE enables computation on encrypted data

exercises.description: Research side-channel resistance techniques for PQC.

exercises.title: Performance Roadmap
exercises.description: Create a performance improvement roadmap for PQC.
hints: Consider hardware acceleration and algorithmic improvements
